<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/api/index/v1/getdocumentstatus"}

<ApiDeprecations deprecations={[{"id":"7eec0433-78fd-49f9-a34f-cca83640ec24","type":"endpoint","name":"POST /api/index/v1/getdocumentstatus","message":"Endpoint is deprecated","introduced":"2026-02-03","removal":"2026-10-15"}]} />


Intended for debugging/validation. Fetches the current upload and indexing status of documents.

Tip: Use [/debug/\{datasource\}/document](https://developers.glean.com/indexing/debugging/datasource-document) for richer information.

  as={"h2"}
